name: Katrina Laszlo
description: Product design for the agent era. Product manager and builder. 10 years of growth and monetization.
principles: Data and design are two sides of the same coin
Opinionated and simple for something painful
Build a business, not an app

projects.name: agentlens

projects.name: buildnext
projects.description: Evidence-grounded user stories, queryable by agents and humans. Ingest transcripts, support tickets, and feature requests. Includes MCP server for agent access.

projects.description: Single-file HTML architecture docs. Readable by humans in a browser and by AI agents via section markers.
